name: E-12 cache: tree_sha in STATS block is at least 8 hex chars (content-addressed key)
command: out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh" --stats --filter "cl414-Q-1-space-config-yaml-ships" 2>&1); echo "$out" | grep -oE "tree_sha=[0-9a-f]{8,}" | head -1 | grep -q tree_sha && echo hex_sha 1>&2
